horoscope: Today's Moon signals you to decompress and rest, dear Aries. It's not ideal for making commitments or final decisions since it's difficult to see the whole picture. As well, on this day before a New Moon, it's best to tie up loose ends. Giving support or help can be rewarding. Communication can help you sort things out, or organizing your thoughts seems particularly worthwhile. As the day advances, you might experience a growing desire to move forward or enjoy something new or different, but you might end up only spinning your wheels right now. You can have good intentions to make improvements, but if things don't run smoothly, you might lose interest quickly. Aim to moderate your expectations. It's not the best day for productivity, as the tendency is to overreach and lose inspiration far too quickly. It would be best to center yourself, reflect on what's missing, and then pace yourself as you set out to pursue it. Be kind to your future self by taking it easy today.

Today's transits can encourage you to handle unfinished business, dear Taurus. Exploring new ideas can be fruitful, and great ideas can result from casual interactions with networks. As the day advances, there can be strong enthusiasm, but you may lack follow-through, discipline, or practicality for now. It's temporary, but it's also wise to pace yourself and keep things moderate. It's best not to feel pressure to start something too quickly today, and speaking too soon on a matter can also be problematic. Avoid overwhelming yourself. The inclination can be to begin a project or endeavor with excitement, but it may not get off the ground until you iron out a few more details. Where you may have been tolerating problems, you now want to either resolve them or move on from them after tomorrow's New Moon.

Aim to pay attention to what you're picking up mentally today, dear Gemini, particularly related to work and business. Communications can be lively and stimulating, as well as refreshingly open. Still, as the day advances, there's some tendency to overdo things or push your limits. You're more sensitive to things that feel dull or meaningless, which can stir some restlessness. While you can certainly use this energy to make changes, for now, you could be seeing things in extremes, making it better to pace and moderate yourself. You may need to adjust to interruptions and distractions. If you aim to hold off on decisions now, then it's a good time to stretch your imagination and consider new possibilities. On this day before a New Moon, take things easy, as the New Moon's energies are likely to redirect you and your interests.

You are especially intrigued by new ideas and experiences, dear Cancer, and you can have a mind-expanding moment today. There can be a real buzz of ideas with you. As the day advances, the tendency to overdo things and speak too quickly or too soon can lead to minor problems. Consider that even if you get what you want, it may not satisfy you if you are not in touch with your actual needs. Watch for acting out of character today, aiming to steer clear of exaggeration. Self-restraint and patience can save the day, and you might enjoy yourself as you entertain new feelings or discover unknown pleasures. Aim to keep your perspective for the best results on this day before a New Moon. It's better to wind yourself down than to wind yourself up.

Today's energies can drive you to research a matter further or seek a deeper understanding of a situation, dear Leo. While you may not have enough information about money matters, joint business ventures, or shared resources to make satisfying conclusions, it's a strong time to further your interests. Playing around with ideas is enjoyable today. As the day advances, it's better to watch for careless moves or words. The inclination is to wing it, which can be spontaneous and fun on a regular day, but may not be wise just for now. If a plan of action is missing today, restlessness can lead to minor mistakes. If you have too many things to manage, you're left with too little time to center yourself. It may be best to self-reflect and aim to understand what you truly need or want because missing the mark is a real possibility with today's transits. On this day before a New Moon, you're better off putting something behind you than you are for new beginnings.

Unfinished business can be on your mind today, dear Virgo. There can be some inner unrest or vague tensions related to matters that you've been avoiding. People have a way of jumpstarting your thinking processes, and your instincts improve for relating. You might enjoy a conversation with someone who's on the same mental wavelength as you. However, as the day advances, there's a tendency to misjudge, but stretching your mind is possible and can be fruitful. Consider that unrealistic expectations don't do you any favors. Watch for going too far, chasing something that you may not genuinely want. With self-awareness, you might discover areas of your life that need an upgrade or special attention. A new perspective can emerge from the contrary theme of the day, or you might take an exciting detour. It may be best that you avoid stretching yourself too thin. On this day before a New Moon, aim to reflect and rest.

You're inclined to want to sort out your feelings and needs today, dear Libra. Communication can help center you and relieve your mind regarding some of your troubles or concerns. As the day advances, you could rather restlessly seek more enjoyment or meaning, but you should watch for unrealistic expectations. The tendency is to shoot a little too high or chase things you don't truly want or need. Temporarily, relationship problems can magnify if expectations blow up. Keep in mind that others may not be seeing you clearly, or they could misunderstand your actions or affections just for now. It may be better not to express your ideas or feelings too quickly. Instead, draw upon your common sense. Ideally, you open your mind to new experiences and possibilities without going too far with this. Feel your desires and enjoy them, but be a little wary of those that are a bit too sudden or overpowering to be true. On this day before a New Moon, you may want to move past problem areas or situations that hold you back from realizing your potential.

You're inclined to want to sort things out and focus today, dear Scorpio. The Moon spends the day in your creative sector, which can be emotionally freeing in some ways. As the day advances, watch for making too much of a situation, as decisions can suffer if you do. Aim to feed a restless spirit with a varied routine, conversation, or knowledge. It's best to find a happy medium between fulfilling your responsibilities and satisfying your desire for experience and excitement through drawing on patience and self-awareness. Mistakes made now are likely due to overblown expectations or lack of foresight. As well, promises made today aren't easy to keep later. On this day before a New Moon, aim to slow down, relax, and reflect.

You need time to center yourself today, dear Sagittarius, but you're also inclined to sort out your needs and feelings, and getting to the root of any recent problems in your personal life is possible. As the day advances, there's some tendency to make promises that are hard to keep or statements that others take as more than they are. With current influences stirring a tendency to go overboard, it may be best to remind yourself of your usual limits and aim not to push them. These things are resolvable, perhaps even nipped in the bud with some mindfulness. You may want to shake things up a little and do something different, and current dissatisfaction can lead to meaningful improvements. In truth, you may be divided on how much intensity you want from your activities or interactions. Be on the lookout for becoming misguided by your whims, and you'll have a much better day. As well, on this day before a New Moon, it's a good idea to take things easy, reflect, and rest.

Your curiosity is strong today, dear Capricorn, and sorting things out comes naturally, making it easier to verbalize what you want. However, as the day advances, watch for mistakes made by ignoring or glossing over details. Restlessness can lead to seeking new pleasures or making some changes and improvements. Or, it might lead you astray, so do watch for overblown expectations. Try not to push beyond your usual limits for the best results. While someone's perspective can be informative, it's better not to be swayed by promises or take too much to heart under current transits. Use this energy for stretching your thinking. On this day before a New Moon, aim to reflect and relax.

Uncertainty can sometimes help give you some rest if you allow it to happen, dear Aquarius, and on this day before a New Moon, it may be a good idea. Still, playing around with ideas is enjoyable today when there's no pressure to reach a decision or conclusion. It can be a good time to build upon what you have rather than urgently seek something new to do early today, although as the day advances, it can be all too tempting to take on too many projects or line up more activities than you can reasonably manage--something to consciously avoid. A good measure involves asking yourself if you'd be able to do these things on a regular day when energy levels and moods are just ordinary. Watch also for reading too much into information you receive, aiming to take things with a grain of salt.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, meeting Mercury, Mars, and the North Node there, dear Pisces. Your desire to express yourself and get things done is stronger than usual. Transits later today can too easily lead you to jump to conclusions or throw yourself into situations without enough thought. Watch for impulsiveness with communications, money, and love, especially. There is a tendency to be a little careless or overindulgent. While you should watch for making too much of a situation, the energies of the day may very well push you to try something new or to discover a new and improved method. Still, you might overvalue something if you're not careful, so aiming to wait and see seems your best bet for now. As well, on this day before a New Moon in your sign, it’s a powerful time to rid yourself of outworn attitudes that weighed you down or prevented a fresh start. However, it's best to save new beginnings until later.
